title: CTAB-Based RNA Extraction with Qiagen RNeasy Cleanup
author: Gonzalo Villarino

steps.title: Prepare f resh CTAB (see Appendix)...
steps.instruction: Prepare f resh CTAB (see Appendix) before harvesting and grinding, keeping it at 65°C. Then, start the centrifuge (4°C).

steps.title: Pre-chill spatulas in cryogenic-safe plastic containers with LN₂
steps.instruction: Pre-chill spatulas in cryogenic-safe plastic containers with LN₂. Tare the calibrated precision balance before weighing samples.

steps.title: Immediately flash-freeze in liquid nitrogen (LN2)
steps.instruction: Immediately flash-freeze in liquid nitrogen (LN2). Using a mortar and pestle , grind to a fine powder in LN2, ensuring the sample remains fully frozen during grinding!

steps.title: Vortex thoroughly for 1 minute
steps.instruction: Vortex thoroughly for 1 minute

steps.title: Add 1 mL (use the P1000...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL (use the P1000 pipette) of pre-heated CTAB buffer to the 2 mL RNase-free tube containing plant powder.

steps.title: Incubate in a water bath at...
steps.instruction: Incubate in a water bath at 65°C for 10 minutes, mixing occasionally (invert the tubes).

steps.title: Add an equal volume ( 1mL ) of chloroform:isoamyl alcohol
steps.instruction: Add an equal volume ( 1mL ) of chloroform:isoamyl alcohol

steps.title: Vortex for 30 seconds
steps.instruction: Vortex for 30 seconds .

steps.title: Incubate for 15 minutes at room...
steps.instruction: Incubate for 15 minutes at room temperature for optimal phase separation

steps.title: Centrifuge at 12,000 x g for 10 minutes at 4°C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 12,000 x g for 10 minutes at 4°C

steps.title: Transfer ~ 500 µL of the...
steps.instruction: Transfer ~ 500 µL of the upper aqueous phase (RNA) to a fresh 1.5 mL RNase-free tube ( do not disturb the interface between the aqueous vs. organic phase). Use the P200 pipette. The aqueous phase should be clear and colorless to pale yellow

steps.title: Use a chilled spatula to transfer...
steps.instruction: Use a chilled spatula to transfer the powdered tissue into a 2mL RNase-free tube (ensure to use a 2mL tube).

steps.title: Add 50 µL of 3M NaOAc...
steps.instruction: Add 50 µL of 3M NaOAc and 1250 µL of 100% ethanol. Invert the tube 5–6 times to mix

steps.title: Incubate at –20°C for 1 hour
steps.instruction: Incubate at –20°C for 1 hour

steps.title: Centrifuge at 12,000 x g for 20 min at 4°C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 12,000 x g for 20 min at 4°C. The RNA will be visible as a white pellet (bottom of the tube)

steps.title: Discard the supernatant by removing the...
steps.instruction: Discard the supernatant by removing the liquid slowly to discard the supernatant. Be careful not to touch the pellet with the pipette tip.

steps.title: Wash the pellet with 1 mL of 75% ethanol
steps.instruction: Wash the pellet with 1 mL of 75% ethanol . Invert the tube 5–6 times. The goal is to ensure the RNA pellet is well-washed without disrupting it . DO NOT VORTEX

steps.title: Centrifuge at 12,000 x g for 5 minutes at 4°C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 12,000 x g for 5 minutes at 4°C . Pipette the ethanol out with a P200

steps.title: Air-dry the RNA pellet for 10...
steps.instruction: Air-dry the RNA pellet for 10 minutes at RT to evaporate the residual ethanol

steps.title: Repeat Steps 18-19
steps.instruction: Repeat Steps 18-19

steps.title: Pre-warm 400 µL Buffer RLT (with...
steps.instruction: Pre-warm 400 µL Buffer RLT (with β-ME added ) to 37°C in heat block

steps.title: Dissolve RNA pellet in 400 µL...
steps.instruction: Dissolve RNA pellet in 400 µL Buffer RLT (with β-ME added). Pipette up & down gently until fully dissolved (If RNA does not fully dissolve, incubate at 37°C for 5 min and vortex briefly)

steps.title: Pass the sample through a QIAshredder...
steps.instruction: Pass the sample through a QIAshredder spin column (lilac) placed in a 2 mL collection tube. Centrifuge at ≥8000 x g for 2 min.

steps.title: Carefully transfer the cleared lysate (~400...
steps.instruction: Carefully transfer the cleared lysate (~400 µL flow-through) to a new tube , avoiding any visible pellet at the bottom. Discard the QIAshredder column.

steps.title: Add 200 µL of ethanol (0
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of ethanol (0.5x volume, 96–100%) to the flow-through. Mix gently by pipetting up and down

steps.title: Transfer the sample onto a pink...
steps.instruction: Transfer the sample onto a pink RNeasy spin column (in a new 2 mL collection tube).

steps.title: Centrifuge at ≥8000 x g for 15 sec
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at ≥8000 x g for 15 sec . Discard the flow-through.

steps.title: Add 700 µL Buffer RW1 to the spin column
steps.instruction: Add 700 µL Buffer RW1 to the spin column. Centrifuge at ≥8000 x g for 15 sec . Discard flow-through

steps.title: Add 500 µL Buffer RPE
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL Buffer RPE. Centrifuge at ≥8000 x g for 15 sec . Discard flow-through

steps.title: Add 500 µL Buffer RPE again
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL Buffer RPE again. Centrifuge at ≥8000 x g for 2 min (removes residual ethanol).

steps.title: Place the RNeasy spin column in...
steps.instruction: Place the RNeasy spin column in a new 2 mL collection tube . Centrifuge at full speed (≥10,000 rpm) for 1 min (ensures ethanol removal).

steps.title: Transfer the RNeasy spin column to a new 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the RNeasy spin column to a new 1.5 mL RNase-free tube .

steps.title: Add 30 µL o f pre-warmed...
steps.instruction: Add 30 µL o f pre-warmed RNase-free water (37°C) directly onto the membrane. Let it sit for 1 min

steps.title: Centrifuge at ≥8000 x g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at ≥8000 x g for 1 min to elute RNA.

steps.title: Prepare DNase incubation mix
steps.instruction: Prepare DNase incubation mix: 10 μL DNase I (RNase-free) + 70 μL Buffer RDD (from Qiagen RNase-Free DNase Set) + Mix gently (pipetting up and down)

steps.title: Apply the DNase mix (80 μL)...
steps.instruction: Apply the DNase mix (80 μL) directly onto the membrane of the RNeasy spin column

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 15 minutes to "kill" DNA
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 15 minutes to "kill" DNA

steps.title: Add 350 µL Buffer RW1 to...
steps.instruction: Add 350 µL Buffer RW1 to the spin column to wash out DNase.

steps.title: Centrifuge at ≥8000 x g for 15 sec
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at ≥8000 x g for 15 sec. Discard flow-through.

steps.title: Set up a portable analytical balance in the GH
steps.instruction: Set up a portable analytical balance in the GH

steps.title: Label one tube per cultivar
steps.instruction: Label one tube per cultivar. Use 50 mL Falcon tubes

steps.title: Bring RNase-free gloves and sterile tools (scissors, tweezers)
steps.instruction: Bring RNase-free gloves and sterile tools (scissors, tweezers).

steps.title: Cut fresh flowers using sterile scissors...
steps.instruction: Cut fresh flowers using sterile scissors (one sample at a time)

steps.title: Place the weighed ~100 mg sample...
steps.instruction: Place the weighed ~100 mg sample into a labeled 50 mL Falcon tube. Poke some holes in lid of Falcon tube.

steps.title: Flash-freeze the plant material (in 50...
steps.instruction: Flash-freeze the plant material (in 50 mL Falcon tube) immediately in liquid nitrogen.
